steps.title: Substitute daylight minutes
steps.content:
The equation is $x+y=1440$, where $x$ is daylight minutes and $y$ is non-daylight minutes. Substitute $x=780$.
$$780+y=1440$$

steps.title: Find non-daylight minutes
steps.content: Subtract $780$ from both sides. $$y=1440-780=660$$ The answer is A.
